title: Living in Boulder Vlog 5 - 29 - 2014 (Showing scars as requested)

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief daily vlog update for May 29, 2014, covering his work day, listening to a book called 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill, and showing scars from a self-performed mole/cyst removal on his neck at viewers' request.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Acknowledges it looks and feels bad but plans to do it again
Enjoys easy reads that can be finished in one day; considering branching out to new titles including possibly the Bible

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up and worked two places yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked all afternoon on the porch until like seven.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I worked in my room until like ten.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got to sleep at like eleven.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm getting close to being done with this one page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I listened to 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do a video about 'Behind the Scenes' by Elizabeth Cascill.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I might listen to some other new things.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was gonna get the Bible, but maybe it's good to spread that out a little bit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's cool listening to a new book that's an easy read when you get through it in one day.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I filmed my sister's scar healing up when I cut the one out of my neck.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do it myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The scar looks ugly and feels bad, but I'll do it pretty soon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm kind of tired right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll do another update and put the flakes in.
